crew.name: lunark
crew.title: founder · engineer
crew.description: Primary engineer and the main coder of the team. She works across backends, game systems, internals, and tends to go pretty deep on whatever she touches.

crew.name: Poime
crew.title: co-founder · designer
crew.description: Co-founder with a background in infrastructure and design. Comfortable with servers, cloud services, and design tooling.

crew.name: Scuffed
crew.title: story & design director
crew.description: Newest member of the crew. He leads on story, direction, creative vision, and brings a grounded perspective that shapes what ariworks_ makes and how it gets there.
